resource.name: chi-sdoh
resource.title: CHI - Social Determinants of Health
resource.description: Community Health Integration care plan template focused on SDoH barriers.

action.title: Secure stable housing
action.description: Goal: Secure stable housing within 90 days

action.title: Connect with housing authority
action.description: Intervention: Contact local housing programs

action.title: Weekly follow-up calls
action.description: Intervention: Check on housing search progress

action.title: Address food insecurity
action.description: Goal: Ensure consistent access to nutritious food

action.title: Food bank referral
action.description: Intervention: Connect to local food bank

action.title: SNAP application assistance
action.description: Intervention: Help apply for food assistance

action.title: Improve transportation access
action.description: Goal: Reliable transportation to medical appointments

action.title: Medical transport enrollment
action.description: Intervention: Enroll in medical transportation service

resource.name: pin-chf
resource.title: PIN - Congestive Heart Failure
resource.description: Principal Illness Navigation care plan for CHF patients.

action.title: Blood pressure: <130/80 mmHg
action.description: Goal: Target blood pressure <130/80 mmHg daily. Duration: 6 months.

action.title: Education: Biometric Targets
action.description: Intervention: Teach patient about BP monitoring

action.title: Weekly BP monitoring
action.description: Intervention: Patient logs daily BP readings

action.title: Heart rate (resting) 60-70 bpm
action.description: Goal: Target resting heart rate 60-70 bpm. Duration: 6 months.

action.title: Medication adherence check
action.description: Intervention: Verify beta-blocker compliance

action.title: 95% adherence to prescribed medications
action.description: Goal: Medication adherence above 95%. Duration: 6 months.

action.title: Pill organizer setup
action.description: Intervention: Provide and set up pill organizer

action.title: Medication refill reminders
action.description: Intervention: Set up pharmacy auto-refill

action.title: Follow heart-healthy, low sodium diet
action.description: Goal: Sodium intake below 2000mg/day. Duration: 6 months.

action.title: Nutrition counseling referral
action.description: Intervention: Refer to dietitian

action.title: Engage in physical activity weekly
action.description: Goal: 150 minutes weekly moderate activity. Duration: 6 months.

action.title: Exercise plan development
action.description: Intervention: Create personalized exercise plan with provider

resource.name: pin-diabetes
resource.title: PIN - Diabetes Management
resource.description: Principal Illness Navigation care plan for diabetes patients.

action.title: A1C below 7%
action.description: Goal: Reduce A1C to below 7%. Duration: 6 months.

action.title: Glucose monitoring education
action.description: Intervention: Teach daily glucose monitoring

action.title: Endocrinology referral
action.description: Intervention: Schedule specialist visit

action.title: BMI 18.5-24.9 (healthy range)
action.description: Goal: Achieve and maintain healthy BMI. Duration: 12 months.

action.title: Nutrition counseling
action.description: Intervention: Weekly nutrition sessions

action.title: Weight tracking
action.description: Intervention: Monthly weigh-ins at clinic

action.title: Daily glucose self-monitoring
action.description: Goal: Patient monitors blood glucose 2x daily. Duration: ongoing.

action.title: Glucometer training
action.description: Intervention: Train patient on device use

action.title: Supply coordination
action.description: Intervention: Ensure test strip coverage
